mainText:
Promo: "Bank of Entitlement: Where your demands are our commands! Get ready to be treated like royalty."

Visit Bank of Entitlement dot com for more.

ENTITLEMENT STORY: So, I strolled into this fancy restaurant, right? I was oozing confidence in my tailored suit, designer watch, and those shiny shoes that probably cost more than some people's monthly rent. Naturally, the hostess greeted me with a smile that said, "Oh wow, finally, someone of your caliber gracing our humble establishment."I was in the mood for a steak, medium-rare, of course. But when I scanned the menu, much to my horror, they were out of stock! Outrageous, right? I mean, what kind of fine dining establishment runs out of steak? I couldn't wrap my entitled brain around it.I calmly beckoned the waiter over, all the while feeling a storm of entitlement brewing inside me. I told him in my most patronizing tone, "I simply cannot fathom the incompetence of this place. Running out of steak? Unacceptable."So, what did they do? They rushed to the nearest butcher and got me the finest cut of steak in the city. As I savored each juicy bite, I couldn't help but feel a sense of satisfaction. The world had once again bent to my will, proving that in the kingdom of entitlement, I reign supreme.
